fire.name: Fire
fire.description: A destructive elemental force focused on damage and burning

water.name: Water
water.description: A chilling elemental force focused on control and slowing

air.name: Air
air.description: A swift elemental force focused on piercing and knockback

earth.name: Earth
earth.description: A heavy elemental force focused on impact and grounding

spirit.name: Spirit
spirit.description: An ethereal arcane force, sealed away and not yet available
